mapper.select:
SELECT p.project_no AS projectNo, p.project_name AS projectName, p.project_desc AS projectDesc, p.project_code AS projectCode FROM project p WHERE p.status BETWEEN 330 AND 370
AND ( EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM vw_member WHERE project_no = p.project_no AND user_id = #{userId}) OR p.public_yn = 1 )
